description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7-wheezy Docker image. Define a pages job (which runs in the deploy stage) that executes the following script steps: git clone https://github.com/getpelican/pelican-plugins.git /data/pelican-plugins, pip install -r requirements.txt, and pelican -s publishconf.py. Configure the job to publish the generated public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No additional services, caches, variables, or rules are required.
